foreseeable_sequence: foreground retained but disconnected components receive no marker
potential_harm: incorrect quantitative result may influence review
controls: SWR-001; human source-overlay review; output not diagnostic

foreseeable_sequence: model or watershed separates instances incorrectly
controls: locked validated postprocessing; external performance/failure-mode validation; user review

foreseeable_sequence: file type valid but stain/tissue/scanner outside envelope
controls: site workflow controls; metadata/quality gate to be implemented after intended-use freeze

foreseeable_sequence: checkpoint replaced or configuration points to unapproved or partially written bytes
controls: SWR-005; SWR-006; SWR-016; atomic durable checkpoint replacement; read-only model mount

foreseeable_sequence: user changes thresholds from validated values
score or augmentation variance presented as probability/uncertainty

controls: SWR-008; PDF plus JSON; output hashes in audit

foreseeable_sequence: a record is edited/deleted or concurrent writers fork/order the chain
controls: SWR-009; monotonic sequence; process lock; persisted head; restricted append storage; external immutable export required

foreseeable_sequence: attacker or untrained user invokes analysis or an unapproved browser origin reaches the service
controls: gateway identity/RBAC; service token; actor audit; exact HTTPS origin allowlist; TLS
verification: runtime/API tests plus penetration and access-control tests

foreseeable_sequence: image decoder exploit decompression bomb or streamed multipart body exceeds policy
controls: SWR-003; SWR-004; pre-parser complete-body limit; file/pixel limits; patched Pillow; sandboxed non-root container
verification: declared/chunked body tests deterministic malformed-image corpus plus independent fuzz/security/load testing

foreseeable_sequence: AJI+ reported as AJI or wrong PQ threshold
controls: SWR-002; metric correction notice; independent statistical verification

foreseeable_sequence: identifiable data enters logs/reports or unauthorized storage
controls: data minimization; no pixels in audit; DPA/DPIA; access and retention policy

foreseeable_sequence: analysis interrupted or stale result displayed
controls: fail-closed readiness; request IDs; transactional UI; operational monitoring
legal/license gate; independently licensed training data

foreseeable_sequence: release contains an unreviewed component or known vulnerability
potential_harm: service compromise/privacy harm or unavailable product
controls: SWR-014; SWR-015; SWR-017; hash lock; Python and container CycloneDX SBOMs; pinned CodeQL and Trivy gates; recurring vulnerability monitoring
verification: SBOM unit/CI verification CodeQL/Trivy records and independent release scan

foreseeable_sequence: an untrusted training or inference artifact triggers unrestricted object deserialization
potential_harm: code execution or compromised model-development evidence
controls: SWR-016; weights-only loading; distinct versioned artifact contracts; strict state loading; approved inference hash
verification: safe-schema serialization and legacy-rejection tests plus release artifact verification
